content: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' feature - adding return_positions param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py primarily.

I've already applied my change to tiktoken/core.py's encode() method (added 'return_positions: bool = False' as the last keyword-only param, plus a return-type union list[int] | tuple[list[int], list[int]], and post-processing logic after the try/except block that computes positions via decode_single_token_bytes). My edit is already on disk. Please add your 'transformers' param BEFORE return_positions in the signature (so return_positions stays last), and apply your text transformation at the very start of the method body before the allowed_special/disallowed_special checks - that shouldn't conflict with my post-encode positions logic at the end. Let me know if you want me to paste the full current method so you can merge cleanly.
